briefdescription.para: Soft Reset Register value to reset.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the XSpdif includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSpdif instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the XSpdif.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.
is a pointer to the XSpdif instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the XSpdif.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to soft reset the interrupt registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSPDIF instance.
is a pointer to the XSpdif instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the clock configuration bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Spdif instance.
is the clock division number. Clk_DivNum value can be only 4,8,16,24,32,48,or 64.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the Sampling Frequency (Fs) and returns it's value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSpdif instance.
is the audio clock frequency value in Hz.

simplesect.para: - Returns the sampling frequency value in Hz.

briefdescription.para: This function reads all the Channel Status registers and writes to a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSpdif instance.
is a pointer to a buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Channel A user data and writes to a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSPDIF instance.
is a pointer to a buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Channel B user data and writes to a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSPDIF instance.
is a pointer to a buffer.
